title: ervatamia hirta
intro: Ervatamia hirta, also known as the hairy ervatamia or snake root, is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ervatamia hirta include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various infections. Ervatamia hirta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional remedies, such as poultices and ointments.
